taskModel.label: Task model
taskModel.description: Chat model used to generate conversation titles and labels.

defaultSystemPrompt.label: Global default system prompt
defaultSystemPrompt.description: Global behavior instructions for all chat models. Leave empty to inject nothing. Model-level prompts are appended after it.
defaultSystemPrompt.placeholder: Example: keep answers accurate and clear, and follow platform safety requirements.

optionPolicyMode.label: Option passthrough policy
optionPolicyMode.description: Controls whether user request options can be passed to upstream providers. By default, only allowlisted paths are passed.

allowedPaths.label: Model option allowlist
allowedPaths.description: JSON object. default applies to every protocol, while protocol-specific entries add paths for that protocol only. Paths use xxx.xxx.

deniedPaths.label: Model option denylist
deniedPaths.description: JSON object. Used only in denylist mode. System-reserved fields are blocked even when they are not listed.

nativeToolTypes.label: Native tool control
nativeToolTypes.description: Independent from the model option allowlist. Controls enabled provider-native tools by protocol. Use an empty array to disable native tools for that protocol.

contextCompactEnabled.label: Context compression
contextCompactEnabled.description: Allow automatic context compression. When off, user-level auto compression is hidden and no snapshot summaries are generated.

contextTokenBudget.label: Token budget truncation
contextTokenBudget.description: Automatically compute budget from the current model context window and trim sendable history.

contextMaxTurns.label: Compression trigger turns
contextMaxTurns.description: Turn-count threshold for triggering context compression.

contextCompactTriggerTokens.label: Compression token threshold
contextCompactTriggerTokens.description: Token-scale threshold for triggering context compression.

contextCompactPreserveTurns.label: Recent turns to preserve
contextCompactPreserveTurns.description: Recent original turns to keep during compression. Older content is summarized.

contextCompactHighlightsPerRole.label: Highlights per role
contextCompactHighlightsPerRole.description: Maximum summary highlights retained for each user and assistant role during template compression.

contextCompactSnippetChars.label: Snippet character limit
contextCompactSnippetChars.description: Maximum characters retained in one message snippet during template compression.

contextArtifactRetentionDays.label: Evidence retention days
contextArtifactRetentionDays.description: Retention period for context evidence, including RAG results, historical evidence, and tool results. 0 disables automatic expiry.

compactAsync.label: Async compression
compactAsync.description: Run compression tasks asynchronously in the background to reduce blocking in the current response pipeline.

compactLLM.label: LLM compression
compactLLM.description: Call a model to generate semantic summaries. When off, only template summaries are used.

compactTaskModel.label: Compression model
compactTaskModel.description: Chat model used to generate compression summaries. Follow current model falls back to the default chat model when the active conversation model is not chat-capable.

compactMaxFailures.label: Circuit threshold
compactMaxFailures.description: Consecutive failure threshold for LLM compression. After reaching it, the system falls back to template summaries.

compactSystemPrompt.label: Full summary prompt
compactSystemPrompt.description: Custom instruction sent to the LLM for full compression. Leave empty to use the built-in default.

compactLightPrompt.label: Light summary prompt
compactLightPrompt.description: Custom instruction sent to the LLM for light compression. Leave empty to use the built-in default.

titlePrompt.label: Title generation prompt
titlePrompt.description: The model must return JSON: '{' "title": "your summarized title" '}'. Supports the '{{MESSAGES}}' placeholder.

labelsPrompt.label: Label generation prompt
labelsPrompt.description: The model must return JSON: '{' "labels": ["label1", "label2"] '}'. Supports the '{{MESSAGES}}' placeholder.

fields.defaultPromptPlaceholder: Leave empty to use the built-in default prompt

preview.title: Live preview
preview.emptyPassed: No paths are currently passed through

guide.title: Option passthrough guide
guide.description: Control which user options can enter upstream requests.
guide.pathDescription: Use the field name for top-level fields. Use dot notation for nested fields. Multiple nesting levels are supported.
guide.allowlistDescription: Only listed paths are passed. Other fields are discarded.
guide.denylistDescription: Pass by default. Paths matched by the denylist or system blocklist are removed.
guide.openAIServiceTierNote: OpenAI service_tier only accepts default, flex, or priority. It is omitted when not configured.
guide.protocolDescription: default applies to every protocol. Other keys apply only to their matching protocol.
guide.systemDeniedDescription: These fields are always blocked and cannot be allowed by the allowlist.

toast.signInAgain: Please sign in again before continuing.
